spring.datasource.username=${DB_USER:root}
spring.datasource.password=${DB_PASS:kA5SYFS*By2}

# HikariCP Connection Pool Optimization (Spring Boot default pool)
spring.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size=10
spring.datasource.hikari.minimum-idle=5
spring.datasource.hikari.connection-timeout=30000
spring.datasource.hikari.max-lifetime=1800000
spring.datasource.hikari.idle-timeout=600000

# JPA/Hibernate Configuration

spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=${JPA_DDL_AUTO:update}
# For production, set JPA_SHOW_SQL to `false`
spring.jpa.show-sql=${JPA_SHOW_SQL:true}
spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.format_sql=true
# Disable Open-in-View to prevent lazy loading issues (best practice)
spring.jpa.open-in-view=false
